case_title: LEAO, LEILANI A. VS WOODS, REGNALDO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY LEAO, LEILANI A. AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, REGNALDO JOHNSON, RUBY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2002 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, REGNALDO JOHNSON, RUBY NON-APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
